summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of Sistema de Gestión Documental. All 28 backend pytest cases PASSED (auth, role-based access, full document workflow registrar→repartir→asignar→en_proceso→finalizado, notifications, comments, history, file upload/download via Emergent Object Storage, brute-force lockout, dashboard stats). Frontend critical flows verified via Playwright: login (admin/recepcionista/jefe/personal), dashboard renders with stats, create document, dispatch to department (status updates to 'repartido'), add comment, admin Users page lists 10 users, Mi Bandeja loads correctly for personal user. App routes are in Spanish (/documentos, /usuarios, /bandeja, /notificaciones).

issues: Medium and Priority use native HTML <select> instead of shadcn Select component (other pages use shadcn). Minor visual inconsistency. Native datetime-local 'Fecha de recepción' uses browser default picker.

action_items: (Optional/cosmetic) Replace native <select> for medium/priority on NewDocumentPage with shadcn Select for visual consistency.
(Optional) Replace native datetime-local input with shadcn calendar+time popover for received_at.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 840 lines - acceptable but consider splitting into routers (auth, users, documents, notifications, stats) if it grows further.
CORS allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' is not strictly compliant per spec; works because frontend uses Bearer (not cookies). OK for now.
Brute-force counter resets to 0 after lockout window starts, masking past attempts; acceptable design.
Storage key fetched lazily and cached globally; race condition on cold start is mitigated by 403 retry. Good.
_next_entry_number returns counter.value but counter could be None on first race; minor.
test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md - admin@gestion.com/admin123, recepcion@gestion.com/demo123, jefe.tecnico@gestion.com/demo123, personal2@gestion.com/demo123 (all working)
seed_data_creation: Backend seed creates admin + 7 demo users on startup. Tests create TEST_-prefixed documents/users and clean them up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend routes are Spanish: /documentos, /usuarios, /bandeja, /notificaciones (NOT /documents, /users etc). When clicking through navigate-after-create flows use page.wait_for_url('**/documentos/**'). Medium/priority on NewDocumentPage are NATIVE selects - use page.select_option(value='email'), not Radix get_by_role. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover full RBAC and workflow; reuse for regression.
